query: ("weather forecast" OR "meteorological forecast" OR "heat forecast" OR "temperature forecast" OR "early warning system" OR "heat warning" OR "weather alert" OR "climate information" OR "forecast intervention" OR "weather-based intervention" OR "heat alert" OR "temperature alert" OR "climate forecast" OR "weather prediction" OR "heat prediction") AND ("cooling center" OR "cooling shelter" OR "heat shelter" OR "cooling station" OR "air conditioning center" OR "community cooling" OR "heat refuge" OR "climate shelter" OR "emergency cooling" OR "public cooling" OR "cooling facility" OR "air conditioning facility" OR "cooling space" OR "heat relief center" OR "thermal refuge") AND ("temperature-mortality" OR "heat-mortality" OR "thermal stress" OR "heat-related death" OR hyperthermia OR "heat stroke" OR "heat exhaustion" OR "temperature-health" OR "thermal health" OR "heat illness" OR "heat-related illness" OR "temperature-morbidity" OR "heat-related morbidity" OR "thermal mortality" OR "excess mortality" OR "heat exposure" OR "thermal exposure") AND (randomized OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment" OR "difference-in-difference" OR "instrumental variable" OR "regression discontinuity" OR "controlled trial" OR "causal inference" OR "exogenous variation" OR "policy evaluation" OR "intervention study" OR "treatment assignment" OR "random assignment" OR "plausibly exogenous" OR "identification strategy" OR "propensity score" OR "matching estimator" OR "counterfactual" OR "treatment effect")
